title: Best trip of my life!
comment: The Golden Triangle tour was absolutely amazing. Our guide was knowledgeable, hotels were comfortable, and the Taj Mahal sunrise was breathtaking. Highly recommend for first-time visitors to India.

title: Great experience, minor issues
comment: Loved the itinerary and sightseeing. Hotels were good but the Agra hotel could have been better. The guide made up for everything though — very friendly and informative.

title: Perfect family vacation
comment: Took my family of 4 on this trip. Kids loved the Amber Fort jeep ride and the street food tour in Old Delhi. Excellent value for money.

title: Goa never disappoints
comment: Great beach resort, loved the cruise party. The spice plantation was a nice surprise addition. Would recommend extending by a day for South Goa exploration.

title: Perfect weekend getaway
comment: Everything was well organized. The beach resort was right on Calangute Beach. The river cruise was the highlight. Already planning to go back!

title: Adventure of a lifetime
comment: Paragliding in Solang Valley and river rafting on Beas were incredible. The camp had great food and the bonfire nights were memorable. Worth every rupee.

title: Romantic and serene
comment: The houseboat in Alleppey was the most romantic experience we've had. Munnar tea gardens were beautiful. Perfect honeymoon package.

title: Kerala is God's own country
comment: Beautiful destinations, well-planned itinerary. The Kathakali show in Kochi was fascinating. Only wish we had more time in Munnar.

title: Spiritual and transformative
comment: The Ganga Aarti was a life-changing experience. The sunrise boat ride on the Ganges was peaceful. Our guide's knowledge of Varanasi's history was impressive.

title: Royal Rajasthan experience
comment: Every city was unique and beautiful. The desert camp in Jaisalmer under the stars was magical. The heritage hotels added so much charm. Best 7 days of my life.

title: Colors of Rajasthan
comment: From the pink city to the blue city to the golden city — each destination was incredible. The camel safari was fun and the thali dinners were delicious.

title: Thrilling adventure
comment: The Rohtang Pass day was amazing with snow activities. River rafting was thrilling. Camp food was surprisingly good. Wish the weather had been clearer for paragliding.
